shortAnswer: The HIV test detects antibodies and sometimes components of the HIV virus in the blood. A positive result is always confirmed by a second, independent test before a final conclusion is made. If you have questions about your test result, contact your doctor or a counseling center.
metaDescription: HIV test positive? Meaning and next steps explained clearly and factually.
doctorQuestions: Has a confirmatory test already been done?
What next steps make sense now?
